content: To handcuff a person with only one hand, you can use a single handcuff and secure it around their wrist, or you may use a flexible restraint device such as zip ties or a cuff that can accommodate their arm. Alternatively, if the other hand is not available, you can secure the handcuff to a fixed object, ensuring the individual is safely restrained. Always ensure that any restraint used is compliant with legal and safety standards.
